title: Ciudad Juárez, Chihuahua — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ciudad Juárez, Chihuahua: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ciudad Juárez is a city in Chihuahua with a population of 1,512,354. Major border city with a strong manufacturing base, crossing the Rio Grande from El Paso, Texas.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
